## Summary

## Change type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Official-source update
- [ ] Paper corpus metadata
- [ ] Evaluation/rubric/sample output
- [ ] Script or validation
- [ ] Skill/module content

## Context-safety check

- [ ] I did not add unnecessary default top-level skills.
- [ ] Detailed modules are placed in suite fragments or advanced skills as appropriate.

## Official-source check

- [ ] Mutable publication details include live verification warnings.
- [ ] Official links are current to the best of my knowledge.

## Copyright safety check

- [ ] I did not include unauthorized full text, figures, tables, captions, or paywalled PDFs.

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/run_smoke_tests.py`
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_distribution.py`
